zh.Sancerre: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯
zh.Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-Fr: 法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾福利米利-拉-福e特
zh.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑桑瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eléonore de Sancerre於1218年出生在法國崔傑桑瑟時，她的父親Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe38歲，母親Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois33歲。她於1234年與Count Adam III de Melun在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1275年之後在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾福利米利-拉-福e特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sancerre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Ovila, Pierre.

French: habitational name from a region in Picardy, located to the southeast of the Somme river, named with Latin sana terra ‘healthy, wholesome land’, and perhaps also from Le Santerre, the name of several places in the northern part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Eléonore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eléonore de Sancerre was born in 1218, in Sancerre, Cher, Centre, France, her father, Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe, was 38 and her mother, Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois, was 33. She married Count Adam III de Melun in 1234, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1275, in Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eléonore de Sancerre est née en 1218, à Sancerre, Cher, Centre, France, son père, Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Count Adam III de Melun en 1234, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1275, à Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eléonore de Sancerre 1218 in Sancerre, Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe 38 und ihre Mutter Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois 33. Sie hat 1234 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Count Adam III de Melun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1275 in Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

ko.Sancerre: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스
ko.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 산서르
ko.lifeSummary: Eléonore de Sancerre(이)가 1218년 프랑스 세트르 처 산서르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1234년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 Count Adam III de Melun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 이후 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 e브리 미리-라-포e트에서 사망했다.

ru.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: сансирр, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eléonore de Sancerre родилась в 1218 г. в местности сансирр, чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Count Adam III de Melun в 1234 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1275 г. в местности милли-ла-форeт, eври, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eléonore de Sancerre nació en 1218, en Sancerre, Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Count Adam III de Melun en 1234, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1275, en Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia.
